checks.name: Prettier
checks.details: The changed TSX, CSS module, and design artifact match repository formatting.

checks.name: ESLint
checks.details: npm run lint completed with zero errors; seven pre-existing unrelated unused-variable warnings remain.

checks.name: Production build
checks.details: npm run build completed successfully and statically generated all song routes.

checks.name: React best-practices review
checks.details: The refinement adds only local SVG attribute selection; it introduces no hooks, state, effects, component boundaries, inline JSX objects, accessibility regressions, or dependency-array changes.

checks.name: Scoped changes
checks.details: Product-code changes remain confined to the renderer and local font registry; song data, alphaTex generation, global theme, and dependencies are unchanged.

visual_checks.name: Three-iteration evidence
visual_checks.details: Evidence includes the 185%/98% baseline, shared 195%/100% iteration, shared 190%/102% iteration, and selected per-glyph 192%/103% major plus 188%/106% minor iteration.

visual_checks.name: Final optical proportions
visual_checks.details: At 390px the selected major mark is about 7.39px wide and the minor mark about 6.09px wide; both remain clearly smaller than their rejected generic-character predecessors.

visual_checks.name: Baseline integration
visual_checks.details: The final mobile screenshot shows the triangle integrated with root and extension, while the independently lifted minor dash reads as a baseline quality sign rather than a low mathematical operator.

visual_checks.name: Font loading and served CSS
visual_checks.details: document.fonts.check passes for both chord families, and the served component CSS contains the Finale Maestro @font-face and existing font asset URL.

visual_checks.name: Available-width fit and representative rows
visual_checks.details: At 390px viewport and document scroll widths both equal 390px; rows containing C major-seven, E-flat major-seven, G minor-seven, F minor-seven, slash chords, and raised flat-nine remain fully visible.

visual_checks.name: Redundant labels
visual_checks.details: The glyph-only refinement adds no labels, headings, controls, or repeated contextual text.

visual_checks.name: Desktop regression
visual_checks.details: At 1024px the score retains four measures per row, both SVG pages fit within the viewport, and the final per-glyph values scale proportionally.

visual_checks.name: Route and dev-server integrity
visual_checks.details: Fresh agent-browser checks found meaningful content, expected navigation controls, and no framework error overlay on both the home route and 기억의 습작 route.
